---
title: "knn"
author: "Steven Liu"
date: "TO414 HW 4"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
---

<div style="padding: 15px; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-left: 5px solid #ccc;">
[Back to MainReportHW4.html](MainReportHW4.html#overviewofmodels)
</div>

# import data

```{r}
train <- readRDS("train_dummy.rds")
test <- readRDS("test_dummy.rds")

str(train)
```

# building the model 

```{r, cache = TRUE}

library(class)

anyNA(train)


knn_pred <- knn(train = train[,(-ncol(train)-1)],
                  test = test[,(-ncol(test)-1)],
                  cl = train[,(ncol(train)-1)],
                  k = 9,
                  prob = TRUE)

knn_prob <- attr(knn_pred, "prob")

saveRDS(knn_pred, file = "knn.rds")
saveRDS(knn_prob, file = "knn_probability.rds")

```

<div style="padding: 15px; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-left: 5px solid #ccc;">
[Back to MainReportHW4.html](MainReportHW4.html#overviewofmodels)
</div>
